tools.name: SearchEngine
tools.description: This API searches for a given keyword for search engine.

tools.name: SendEmail
tools.description: This API for sending email, given the receiver, subject and content.

receiver.description: The receiver address of the email.

subject.description: The subject address of the email.

tools.name: QueryBalance
tools.description: This API queries the balance of a given user.

tools.name: DeleteScene
tools.description: This API deletes a scene by its name.

tools.name: AddAgenda
tools.description: The API for adding a agenda item includes content, time and location.

tools.name: QueryReminder
tools.description: The API for querying a reminder item includes content and time.

time.description: The time for the reminder. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

tools.name: PlayMusic
tools.description: This API triggers a music player to play music.

music_name.description: The name of the music to play.

status.description: The corresponding url scheme to trigger the music player.

tools.name: ToolSearcher
tools.description: Searches for relevant tools in library based on the keywords.

tools.name: ModifyMeeting
tools.description: This API allows users to modify a reservation for a meeting

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

tools.name: DeleteMeeting
tools.description: This API allows users to delete a reservation for a meeting and remove the meeting information in the database.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

tools.name: Dictionary
tools.description: This API searches the dictionary for a given keyword.

results.description: The list of results. Format be like [{"partOfSpeech": "xxx", "definitions": [{"definition": "xxx", "example": "xxx", "synonyms": ["xxx", "xxx"]}, ...]

tools.name: CancelTimedSwitch
tools.description: Cancels a timed switch for a smart device.

name.description: The name of the smart device.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

status.description: Whether the time switch is successful.

tools.name: QueryMeeting
tools.description: This API allows users to query the information of a meeting.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

tools.name: SymptomSearch
tools.description: This API searches for a given symptom.

results.description: The list of results. Format be like [{"name":possible disease name, "description": disease details},...]

tools.name: RecordHealthData
tools.description: This API records the health data of a user.

time.description: The time of health data. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

health_data.description: The health data, with the format like [{'name': 'blood_pressure', 'value': '120/80'}, {'name': 'heart_rate', 'value': '80'}]

tools.name: TimedSwitch
tools.description: This API for setting a timed switch for a smart device.

name.description: The name of the smart device.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

on.description: Whether to switch the device on or off.

status.description: Whether the time switch is successful.

tools.name: DeleteAgenda
tools.description: The API for deleting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.

tools.name: ModifyReminder
tools.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.

tools.name: ModifyPassword
tools.description: The API for modifying the password of the account.

old_password.description: The old password of the user.

new_password.description: The new password of the user.

tools.name: CheckToken
tools.description: Check the user token.

tools.name: SpeechRecognition
tools.description: This API recognizes the speech from a given audio url.

url.description: The url to download the audio. It should end with .wav.

tools.name: QueryStock
tools.description: This API queries the stock price of a given stock code and date.

stock_code.description: The stock code of the given stock.

date.description: The date of the stock price. Format: %Y-%m-%d

stock_price.description: The stock price of the given stock.

tools.name: DocumentQA
tools.description: This API answers the question from a given document url.

url.description: The url to download the document. It should end with .txt.

tools.name: DeleteAccount
tools.description: Delete an account.

tools.name: QueryAlarm
tools.description: The API for querying alarm clock, help user to check the alarm clock they have set.

info.description: alarm info including username, time, content and location

tools.name: ImageCaption
tools.description: This API generates a caption for a given image.

url.description: The url to download the image. It should end with .jpg, .jpeg or .png.

tools.name: ModifyScene
tools.description: This API modifies a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description.

tools.name: ModifyAgenda
tools.description: The API for modifying a schedule item includes parameters for content, time, and location.

time.description: The new time for agenda. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The new location of the agenda.

tools.name: AddMeeting
tools.description: This API allows users to make a reservation for a meeting and store the meeting information (e.g., topic, time, location, attendees) in the database.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

tools.name: QueryHealthData
tools.description: This API queries the recorded health data in database of a given user and time span.

user_id.description: The user id of the given user. Cases are ignored.

start_time.description: The start time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

health_data.description: The health data of the given user and time span.

tools.name: QueryRegistration
tools.description: This API queries the registration of a patient, given patient ID.

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

appointments.description: The dict where from appointment_id to a list like ["patient_name":xxx, "date":xxx, "doctor_name":xxx]

tools.name: ModifyAlarm
tools.description: The API for modifying an alarm includes a parameter for the from_time to to_time.

from_time.description: The time for alarm which changed from. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

to_time.description: The time for alarm which changed to. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

tools.name: AddReminder
tools.description: The API for adding a reminder item includes content and time.

tools.name: Wiki
tools.description: This API for searching a keyword in Wikipedia.

results.description: The list of results. Format be like {"url": "xxx", "summary": "xxx", "content": "xxx"}

tools.name: Calculator
tools.description: This API provides basic arithmetic operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

formula.description: The formula that needs to be calculated. Only integers are supported. Valid operators are +, -, *, /, and (, ). For example, '(1 + 2) * 3'.

tools.name: RegisterUser
tools.description: The API for registering a account, given the username, password and email.

tools.name: AppointmentRegistration
tools.description: This API registers an appointment of hospital.

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

tools.name: QueryScene
tools.description: This API queries a scene of smart home system, given the scene name

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description.

tools.name: GetUserToken
tools.description: Get the user token by username and password.

tools.name: CancelRegistration
tools.description: This API cancels the registration of a patient given appointment ID.

tools.name: EmergencyKnowledge
tools.description: This API searches for a given symptom for emergency knowledge.

results.description: The list of results. Format be like [{"name":possible disease name, "aid": first-aid method},...]

tools.name: GetToday
tools.description: This API gets the current date.

tools.name: QueryHistoryToday
tools.description: This API queries the history of the given date.

date.description: The date of the history. Format: %m-%d

history.description: The history of the user today.

tools.name: ForgotPassword
tools.description: Sends an email to the user with a link to reset the password. Need call twice, first with 'Forgot Password' status to get the verification code, then call again with 'Verification Code' status to change the password. Must pass the name of the parameters when calling the API, like ForgotPassword(status='Forgot Password', username='username').

status.description: 'Forgot Password' for first call, after get the verification code, call again with 'Verification Code' to change the password.

username.description: The username of the user. Only needed for the first call.

email.description: The email of the user. Only needed for the first call.

verification_code.description: The verification code sent to the user. Only needed for the second call.

new_password.description: The new password of the user. Only needed for the second call.

tools.name: BookHotel
tools.description: This API orders a hotel room. Two rooms are ordered if the number of adults is greater than 2. Only one order can be made at same time.

check_in_time.description: The time to check in. Format: %Y-%m-%d

check_out_time.description: The time to check out. Format: %Y-%m-%d

room_count.description: The number of rooms to order.

tools.name: AddAlarm
tools.description: The API for setting an alarm includes a parameter for the alarm time.

tools.name: QueryAgenda
tools.description: The API for getting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.

info.description: agenda info including username and time

tools.name: DeleteReminder
tools.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.

tools.name: DeleteAlarm
tools.description: The API for removing an alarm includes a parameter for the time.

tools.name: ModifyRegistration
tools.description: This API modifies the registration of a patient given appointment ID.

tools.name: OpenBankAccount
tools.description: This is an API for opening a bank account for a user, given the account, password and name.

tools.name: AddScene
tools.description: This API adds a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description. Format be like [{"name": "light", "description": "Smart light in the kitchen"}, {"name": "oven", "description": "Smart oven in the kitchen"}, {"name": "range hood", "description": "Smart range hood in the kitchen"}]
